title: searchscope
text: searchscope Set the range of the search. USYS$LDP_PARAMS { = } ldap_scope_base | ldap_scope_onelevel | ldap_scope_subtree Arguments ldap_scope_base —entries on the search base level ldap_scope_onelevel —entries on the search base and child entries ldap_scope_subtree —entries on the search base and all lower levels; default Was this topic helpful?
